description: Strategic frameworks for business analysis, goal setting, competitive positioning, and long-term vision development

knowledge.name: Design Philosophy
knowledge.description: Why strategy boards exist, cognitive principles (Structured Analysis, Prospect Theory, Anchoring, Spatial Reasoning), visual design principles, and core tensions

knowledge.name: Layout Patterns
knowledge.description: Five patterns (Four-Quadrant/SWOT, Nine-Block/BMC, Hierarchical Cascade/OKR, Positioning Map, Vision-to-Execution Bridge) with ASCII diagrams and spatial rules

knowledge.name: Visual Guide
knowledge.description: Four palettes (Executive Authority, Strategic Clarity, Competitive Fire, Balanced Wisdom), strategy typography, connector types, and quality checklist

knowledge.name: Content Guide
knowledge.description: Content by framework (SWOT, BMC, OKR, Competitive Analysis, Vision Board) with real examples, writing guidelines, and volume guidelines

knowledge.name: Build Process
knowledge.description: Six-phase workflow with strategy-specific Miro API code, SWOT/BMC/OKR construction, implications zone, and validation checklists

knowledge.name: Examples Reference
knowledge.description: Six detailed examples (Enterprise SWOT, Startup BMC, OKR Cascade, Competitive Map, Vision Bridge, Non-Profit Hybrid), anti-patterns, and transformations

knowledge.name: Variations
knowledge.description: Industry adaptations (SaaS, Healthcare, Fintech, Education, Agency), team sizes, complexity levels, cultural considerations, and cross-board integrations

templates.name: SWOT Analysis
templates.description: Four-quadrant analysis board mapping Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, and Threats

templates.name: Business Model Canvas
templates.description: Nine-block canvas for designing and iterating on business models following the Osterwalder framework

templates.name: OKR Planning
templates.description: Objectives and Key Results planning board with company, team, and individual goal alignment

templates.name: Vision Board
templates.description: Inspirational strategic vision board combining mission, values, long-term goals, and aspirational imagery

templates.name: Competitive Analysis
templates.description: Multi-competitor comparison board with feature matrices, positioning maps, and strategic insights
